'''Quiv''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who served in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] and a communications officer onboard [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
